case_title: MAZDA AMERICAN CREDIT vs. ADELMAN, MICHAEL A. et al

docket_entries.description: COMPLAINT/PETITION/FIRST PAPER STRICKEN BY COURT ORDER FOR FAILURE TO REDEEM INVALID CHECK FOR TRANSACTION 1511C1040000; NO FURTHER FILINGS ON PART OF
